content: Phase T complete: hierarchy sync, filter ribbon, date slicer, timers, fuzzy search, admin CRUD
Phase U complete: UNASSIGNED column, claim, Predictive, My Tasks, universal WO popout + ?wo= deep-links
Analytics: date range slicer, Closure Rate KPI, Failure Modes Pareto, dedup dept filter
AWS page: 3 health pools (MEC/ELE/PLC) + admin threshold config
Full testing agent run (frontend) across all phases
